case_title: AMANDA INOCENCIO VS. BRYAN'S MARKET (AKA BRYAN'S QUALITY MEATS) PETER OR TERRENCE FLANNERY ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF INOCENCIO, AMANDA AS TO DEFENDANT BRYAN'S MARKET AKA BRYAN'S QUALITY MEATS
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR SMALL CLAIMS HEARING HEARING SET FOR JAN-13-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY INOCENCIO, AMANDA AS TO DEFENDANT P+T FLANNERY SEAFOODS, INC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-13-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-13-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-13-2011 - JUDGMENT.

DECLARATION OF SMALL CLAIMS CASE TO CORRECT DEFENDANT'S NAME. DEFENDANT BRYAN'S MARKET AKA BRYAN'S QUALITY MEATS IS TO BE DISMISSED AND ADDING NEW DEFENDANT P&T FLANNERY SEAFOODS, INC. FILED BY PLAINTIFF INOCENCIO, AMANDA

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BRYAN'S MARKET AKA BRYAN'S QUALITY MEATS
